|win|tzarii
|c|☆orionsayshi|ggs forgot about rage powder! wp
|c|☆tzarii|ggs!
|c|☆orionsayshi|blastoise water spout is a solid team
|c|☆tzarii|there was a way for you to win
|c|☆orionsayshi|didnt see it. whatd i miss?
|c|☆tzarii|err well not win
|c|☆tzarii|no it wouldn't be a win
|c|☆orionsayshi|maybe jet punch palafin in rain couldve weakened spout and then i could matcha
|c|☆tzarii|I was gonna say disable sinisthca instead of protecting on turn 3, but sableye would have been ohko'd anyways
|c|☆orionsayshi|yeah. i was hoping youd switch sinis
|c|☆tzarii|if you had gone for disable first instead of encore tho
|c|☆tzarii|then I think things would be different
|c|☆orionsayshi|mgengar sableye is good but tricky to get right
|c|☆tzarii|because then on turn 3 I couldn't rage powder away the encore
|c|☆orionsayshi|right then youd be stuck in shell smash
|c|☆orionsayshi|but i think you couldve just done spout immediately
|c|☆tzarii|I could have spouted on turn 2 and that's likely the better play
|c|☆tzarii|but its so much more satisfying to get shell smash off
|c|☆tzarii|also gambit goes hard into this team
|c|☆tzarii|I assume that's why you have kommo-o
|c|☆orionsayshi|yeah gambit is a big weakness
|c|☆orionsayshi|i also have scarf palafin and i think close combat ohkos non berry gambit even as baby palafin lol
